title: The clinical relevance and newsworthiness of NIHR HTA-funded research: a cohort study.
author: Wright D Young A Iserman E Maeso R Turner S Haynes RB Milne R
content:
S-EPMC4024580 PMC4024580 The clinical relevance and newsworthiness of NIHR HTA-funded research: a cohort study.

Objective

To assess the clinical relevance and newsworthiness of the UK National Institute for Health Research (NIHR) Health Technology Assessment (HTA) Programme funded reports
